name: Fiery Beef Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless tender beef steak (sirloin, rib eye or top-loin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef across grain into thin strips.
2. In a small bowl, combine 1 tablespoon each cornstarch and soy sauce with sugar and garlic. Stir in the beef. Let stand for 15 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, in another bowl, mix water, remaining 3 tablespoons soy sauce, 4 teaspoons cornstarch, vinegar, and red pepper. Set aside.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat. Add beef and stir-fry for 1 minute; remove from heat.
5. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons oil to the pan. Stir-fry cauliflowerets lightly sprinkled with salt for 2 minutes.
6. Add onion and green pepper, stirring for another 4 minutes.
7. Return the beef and soy sauce mixture to the pan. Cook and stir until the sauce boils and thickens.
Serves: 2
From: Kikkoman recipe booklet
